apiKey.description: API key for exchange rate service

tools.name: convert_currency
tools.description: Convert an amount from one currency to another

name: Notifications

name: PagBank
description: Brazilian payment gateway integration: PIX, boleto, credit card payments, order management, and refunds via PagBank API v4.

token.description: PagBank API token (found in your PagBank dashboard under Integrações)

tools.name: pagbank_create_pix_order
tools.description: Create a PIX payment order in PagBank. Returns the order with PIX QR code data for the customer to pay. The amount is in cents (e.g. 10000 = R$100.00).

tools.name: pagbank_create_boleto_order
tools.description: Create a boleto payment order in PagBank. Returns the order with boleto PDF and barcode for the customer to pay. The amount is in cents (e.g. 10000 = R$100.00).

due_date.description: Boleto due date in YYYY-MM-DD format

tools.name: pagbank_create_card_order
tools.description: Create a credit card payment order in PagBank. Requires an encrypted card from PagBank.js. The amount is in cents (e.g. 10000 = R$100.00).

encrypted_card.description: Encrypted card data from PagBank.js encrypt function

holder_name.description: Name as printed on the card

capture.description: Whether to auto-capture the payment (true = charge immediately, false = pre-authorize only)

soft_descriptor.description: Text that appears on the customer's card statement (max 17 chars)

tools.name: pagbank_get_order
tools.description: Get details and payment status of an order by its PagBank order ID (starts with ORDE_).

tools.name: pagbank_get_charge
tools.description: Get details of a specific charge by its PagBank charge ID (starts with CHAR_).

tools.name: pagbank_refund_charge
tools.description: Refund a charge (full or partial). Amount is in cents and is always required by PagBank API.

charge_id.description: PagBank charge ID to refund (e.g. CHAR_XXXXXXXXXXXX)

amount.description: Amount to refund in cents (e.g. 5000 = R$50.00)

tools.name: pagbank_capture_charge
tools.description: Capture a pre-authorized credit card charge. Use this when the card order was created with capture=false.

charge_id.description: PagBank charge ID to capture (e.g. CHAR_XXXXXXXXXXXX)

amount.description: Amount to capture in cents (must be <= authorized amount)

tools.name: pagbank_list_orders
tools.description: List orders within a date range. Optionally filter by your internal reference_id.

reference_id.description: Filter by your internal reference ID (optional)
